title: Dreams
subtitle: Review OpenClaw memory signals, diary entries, and dreaming maintenance from clawx.
gatewayNotReady: OpenClaw Gateway is still starting or disconnected. Dreams data will load once the gateway is reachable.

diary.title: Dream Diary
diary.notFound: DREAMS.md has not been created yet.
diary.empty: No dream diary entries found yet.

actions.title: Maintenance
actions.enableSuccess: Dreams started. Gateway may restart to apply the managed schedule.
actions.disableSuccess: Dreams stopped. Gateway may restart to remove the managed schedule.
actions.dedupeSuccess: Removed {{removed}} duplicate dream entries and kept {{kept}}.

dedupe.title: Dedupe Dream Diary?
dedupe.message: This rewrites DREAMS.md and removes only exact duplicate diary entries.

repair.title: Repair Dream Cache?
repair.message: This archives derived dream cache files and rebuilds them from clean inputs. Your dream diary stays untouched.

resetDiary.title: Reset Backfilled Diary?
resetDiary.message: This removes backfilled diary entries from DREAMS.md. Manually written content is not the target.

resetGrounded.title: Clear Replayed Short-Term Entries?
resetGrounded.message: This clears short-term entries that were already replayed into grounded memory signals.

signals.title: Recent Signals
signals.empty: No recent short-term or promoted dream signals.

errors.openFullUi: Unable to open the full OpenClaw Dreams UI.
errors.configHashMissing: Unable to update Dreams because the config base hash is unavailable.
errors.memoryInitializing: Dreams memory is still initializing. Please retry after Gateway finishes startup.
